sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Polarizing express: Railroad deal spurs debate
feed.summary: A proposed $85 billion merger between Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern to create a single transcontinental freight rail carrier faces significant opposition despite its proponents' claims of increased efficiency and reduced emissions. Critics, including the American Farm Bureau Federation and several state attorneys general, argue the deal would lead to reduced competition, higher prices for shippers, and undue market concentration. The U.S. Surface Transportation Board initially rejected the application, and a decision is not expected until 2027, with political influence from figures like former President Donald Trump also playing a role.

feed.title: Suncor Energy Updates and Files Revised Business Conduct and Accounting Control Standards
feed.summary: Suncor Energy (TSE:SU) has updated and filed its revised Standards of Business Conduct Code and Compliance Program with the U.S. SEC on March 26, 2026. The company reinforced its financial reporting, internal controls, and non-retaliation policies in January 2026. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates SU as an Outperform, citing strong financial performance and a supportive earnings-call backdrop, despite some cooling in fundamentals from prior peaks.

feed.title: BX vs. KKR: Which is a Smarter Bet as Private Credit Markets Tighten?
feed.summary: This article compares Blackstone (BX) and KKR in the context of tightening private credit markets, analyzing their business models, growth strategies, and financial performance. While Blackstone emphasizes scale and diversified fee-based earnings with $1.27 trillion AUM, KKR integrates an insurance model to deploy long-term capital and aims for $1 trillion AUM by 2030. The analysis concludes that Blackstone offers stability, while KKR provides higher upside potential, and both currently hold a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Will USDA's Farm Income Decline Reflect on Deere's Margin in FY26?
feed.summary: Deere & Company (DE) is facing persistent challenges, with its net income declining for nine consecutive quarters due to factors like commodity prices, high input costs, and elevated interest rates, negatively impacting farm sentiment. The USDA forecasts a minor dip in net farm income for 2026, which is expected to affect demand for farm equipment. Despite these headwinds, Deere has raised its fiscal 2026 net income guidance, largely driven by anticipated sales growth in its construction and small agriculture segments.

feed.title: Honeywell Teams with Rhombus to Modernize Building Security
feed.summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) has partnered with Rhombus to offer an integrated cloud-based access control and video management solution, enhancing building security for various commercial environments. This collaboration supports Honeywell's modernization efforts, which began with the acquisition of LenelS2 in 2024, and comes as the cloud video solutions market is projected to grow significantly. Additionally, Honeywell committed $500 million to upgrade its defense production capacity and will provide its Q1 financial update on April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Verisign Inc. stock surges 3% on NASDAQ amid strong trading volume as domain registry demand stabili
feed.summary: Verisign Inc. (NASDAQ: VRSN) saw its stock climb 3.0% to $248.41 on the NASDAQ, driven by strong trading volume and stable demand for .com and .net domains. This surge highlights the company's resilient performance in a volatile market and its defensive qualities within the tech sector. Upcoming Q1 earnings on April 23, 2026, and its position relative to its 52-week range suggest potential for further momentum.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Boston Scientific Corporation of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - BSX
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) for alleged securities fraud or other unlawful business practices. Investors who acquired Boston Scientific securities during the Class Period are encouraged to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff by May 4, 2026. The lawsuit stems from Boston Scientific's lower-than-expected Q4 2025 sales and disappointing 2026 guidance, attributed to slow market growth and increased competition, which caused a significant drop in the company's stock price.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Stellantis N.V. - STLA
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has launched an investigation into Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) following a significant drop in its stock price. The investigation concerns potential securities fraud or unlawful business practices after Stellantis announced €22.2 billion in charges related to a strategic reset and alignment with customer preferences. These charges, excluded from adjusted operating income, led to a 23.69% decline in the company's stock on February 6, 2026.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Insulet Corporation - PODD
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD) on behalf of its investors. This investigation follows a significant drop in Insulet's stock price after the company disclosed a manufacturing issue leading to a voluntary Medical Device Correction for specific lots of its Omnipod® 5 Pods. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact Pomerantz LLP.

feed.title: Aptiv plc Stock: Navigating Electrification and Connectivity in a Transforming Auto Sector
feed.summary: Aptiv plc is positioned at the forefront of automotive technology, providing critical electrical architecture and software solutions for electric and autonomous vehicles. The article details its business model, core products, market positioning, and strategic priorities, emphasizing its role in the industry's shift towards electrification, autonomy, and connectivity. It also covers the company's financial health, investor relevance for US and Canadian markets, and potential risks, highlighting its focus on long-term contracts with OEMs and R&D investment.

feed.title: Wall Street Cuts Mosaic Company Again: UBS Slashes Target to $27
feed.summary: UBS has downgraded The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) to Neutral and cut its price target to $27, citing structural pressure on phosphate profitability due to high sulfur and ammonia input costs exacerbated by Middle East supply disruptions. This aligns with similar downgrades from other major Wall Street firms, with margin expansion now anticipated in 2027 instead of 2026. While long-term tailwinds exist, near-term challenges like rising conversion costs and negative free cash flow are limiting upside.

feed.title: Entergy Corp. Stock: Utility Leader in a Transforming Energy Landscape for US and Canadian Investors
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. serves millions across key US regions, providing reliable power while strategically investing in cleaner energy. The company offers a defensive play for investors with growth potential from increasing power demands, supported by grid modernization, clean energy transitions, and a solid financial position. While focused on steady dividends and long-term value, investors should be aware of risks such as weather events, regulatory shifts, and interest rate sensitivity.

feed.title: Teledoc (TDOC) Gets a $7 Price Target From Barclays: Can It Double From Recent Lows?
feed.summary: Barclays has cut its price target for Teladoc (TDOC) to $7 from $8.50, maintaining an Equal Weight rating, despite the stock having recovered from its lows. The company's future growth hinges on the success of BetterHelp's transition to an insurance-based delivery model and the stabilization of Integrated Care membership. Achieving the $7 target, which implies a market capitalization of $1.25 billion, requires robust performance in BetterHelp's insurance scaling and overall profitability improvements.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty Just Launched a $10K Grant Program to Support Female Athletes
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty has launched the "Ulta Beauty Roster for Change Grant," a $10,000 grant program aimed at empowering young female athletes and addressing barriers that cause them to drop out of sports. Six grants will be awarded to support needs like transportation, equipment, and facility upgrades. The initiative partners with elite female athletes to promote the intersection of beauty and athletics, encouraging confidence and community in sports.

feed.title: PPG Industries Inc. Stock: Innovation in Coatings Drives Sustainable Growth for Investors
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. leads the coatings and specialty materials market, driven by its focus on sustainable innovation and efficiency, including new waterborne technologies and workforce development initiatives. The company's diversified business model and commitment to ESG principles offer stable growth and dividend income for investors, despite challenges like raw material costs and market competition. Investors should monitor PPG's quarterly earnings for insights into margin trends and product innovation.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Uncapped Buffered Return Enhanced Notes linked to the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 Indices, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These structured investments are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return of at least 1.3675 times any appreciation of the least performing index, but buyers must be prepared to lose up to 75% of their principal. The notes carry significant risks, including credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co., and potential conflicts of interest as the guarantor and issuer's affiliates play multiple roles in connection with the notes.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corp. stock: Business model, competitive position and key investor considerations
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of Exxon Mobil Corp.'s business model, competitive position, and key investor considerations for US and Canadian investors. It highlights the company's integrated operations, strategic priorities including capital discipline and lower-carbon solutions, and its competitive standing against other energy majors. The analysis also covers sector dynamics, market drivers, risks, and open questions relevant to Exxon Mobil's stock performance.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Inc. Stock: A Comprehensive Look at Business Model, Valuation, and Investor Con
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. (AMP) is a diversified financial services leader with strong value metrics, focusing on wealth management, asset management, and insurance. The company leverages client-focused strategies, an independent advisor network, and technological investments to navigate market conditions and compete with industry giants. Key growth drivers include strategic initiatives in advisor recruitment, product innovation, sustainable investing, and international expansion, while facing risks from market downturns, regulatory changes, and competition.

feed.title: Micron and SanDisk stocks are getting pummeled this week. Is the memory chip rally over?
feed.summary: Shares of Micron Technology (MU) and SanDisk (SNDK) are experiencing a significant drop this week, reversing a recent rally. This downturn comes despite a broader market that has been relatively flat and an ongoing RAM shortage fueled by the demand for AI technologies. Investors may be locking in profits, questioning whether the memory chip rally has concluded.

feed.title: NAB 2026: Telestream Expands Vantage Integration with Adobe Premiere, Media Encoder, and Frame.io
feed.summary: Telestream has announced expanded integration between its Vantage workflow platform and Adobe Premiere, Adobe Media Encoder (AME), and Frame.io, to be demonstrated at NAB 2026. This integration aims to streamline media workflows by enabling editors to submit sequences directly from Premiere into Vantage, which then manages rendering, metadata application, and routing of assets. The goal is to enhance operational efficiency and creative control by automating render jobs and asset delivery processes.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies Inc. Stock: Cloud Security Leader Positions for Long-Term Growth Amid Digital Transformation
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies Inc. is evolving its business model from traditional content delivery networks (CDN) to high-margin cloud security and edge computing services. The company is strategically positioned to capitalize on the increasing demand for cybersecurity solutions and edge infrastructure due to rising cyber threats and data growth. Investors should monitor Akamai's transition, competitive landscape, and potential risks like macroeconomic pressures and pricing wars, as it balances mature assets with high-growth segments.

feed.title: Mizuho Lowers Price Target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $70
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Paul Fremont has maintained a 'Neutral' rating for Eversource Energy (ES) but lowered the price target from $75 to $70, reflecting a cautious outlook. This adjustment comes amidst mixed analyst ratings for Eversource, with some increasing and others decreasing their price targets recently. Eversource Energy is a diversified holding company providing electric, gas, and water distribution services in the Northeast US, with an average target price among analysts of $74.84.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Stock: Resilient Wealth Management Leader Amid Evolving Markets
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) is presented as a resilient wealth management leader, showing steady growth in its diversified business segments of private client services, capital markets, and asset management. The article highlights its advisor-centric model, strong assets under management (AUM) growth, and strategic positioning to capture opportunities like wealth transfer from aging demographics. It also discusses risks such as interest rate fluctuations and competition, while noting its appeal to US and Canadian investors for stability and dividend consistency.

feed.title: Bernstein Initiates Stellantis NV(STLA.US) With Hold Rating, Announces Target Price $7.17
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst Eunice Lee has initiated coverage on Stellantis NV (STLA.US) with a "Hold" rating, setting a target price of $7.17. According to TipRanks data, Lee has a 45.9% success rate and a 5.5% average return over the past year. TipRanks provides independent analysis of financial analysts' performance based on their recommendations.

feed.title: Johnson Fistel, PLLP Begins Investigation on Behalf of
feed.summary: Johnson Fistel, PLLP has initiated investigations on behalf of long-term shareholders of Firefly Aerospace Inc. (FLY), Flywire Corporation (FLYW), Fortinet, Inc. (FTNT), and Compass Diversified Holdings (CODI). The investigations concern potential claims against the companies' officers and directors for alleged breaches of fiduciary duty, stemming from previously filed securities class action complaints. Shareholders who held shares continuously prior to specific dates mentioned for each company may have standing to seek corporate governance reforms.

feed.title: ONEOK Rose 7% This Week. Here’s Why the Stock Still Has Upside in 2026
feed.summary: ONEOK (OKE) stock increased by 7% this week, driven by investor rotation into midstream energy, bullish options activity, and an analyst upgrade. The company's integrated natural gas and NGL network benefits from increasing U.S. natural gas demand. A valuation model suggests the stock is modestly undervalued with a target price of $107, implying 16.5% upside over three years due to stable fee-based revenues and integration synergies.

feed.title: ENPHASE PROMISED $370M BUT DELIVERED A $5.56/SHARE LOSS — SUEWALLST, LLP
feed.summary: A securities class action lawsuit led by Levi & Korsinsky, LLP, is targeting Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) for allegedly misleading investors with optimistic projections that contradicted actual results, leading to a $5.56 per share loss. The lawsuit claims that Enphase overstated its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate the effects of the 25D Credit termination. Investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to inquire about recovering their losses, with a lead plaintiff deadline set for April 20, 2026.

feed.title: TJX Companies Hit a $60 Billion Milestone: Here’s What to Expect
feed.summary: TJX Companies, operating TJ Maxx, Marshalls, and HomeGoods, has achieved $60 billion in annual net sales for the first time in fiscal 2026, alongside five consecutive years of 5% comparable sales growth. Despite the stock nearing its 52-week high, Wall Street's skepticism regarding fiscal 2027 guidance presents a potential entry point given the company's strong performance, expansion plans, and cost recovery. Valuation models suggest significant upside, supported by continued operational strength and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 0% stake in Newmont (NYSE: NEM) after internal realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0% beneficial ownership in Newmont Corp (NEM) common stock. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which directs certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report holdings separately. The filing, signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, indicates that Vanguard itself no longer holds or is deemed to hold beneficial ownership over these securities.

feed.title: John Deere and Tarter USA Announce Strategic Partnership to Launch American-Made Flex Wing Rotary Cutters
feed.summary: John Deere and Tarter USA have formed a strategic partnership to manufacture a new line of American-made Flex Wing Rotary Cutters under the Frontier™ brand. This collaboration, based in Liberty, Kentucky, has already seen demand exceed initial forecasts and has created 26 new jobs. The partnership leverages Tarter USA's advanced manufacturing capabilities and John Deere's market understanding to deliver high-quality, durable products for the agricultural sector.

feed.title: Valero Prepares Restart of Port Arthur Refinery After Blast
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp. is preparing to restart its 380,000 barrel-per-day Port Arthur, Texas, oil refinery this week after an explosion and fire shut down key units. The incident, which occurred after process fluid was released on a diesel hydrotreater unit, caused no injuries but was felt 11 miles away. Operators are now working to gradually return the facility to full capacity as refining margins remain strong due to global supply disruptions.

feed.title: Arch Capital Trades Above 200-Day SMA: Time to Hold the Stock?
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. (ACGL) is trading above its 200-day simple moving average, indicating a bullish trend. The company shows strong premium growth, disciplined underwriting, and a robust capital position, reinforcing its sustained growth potential despite a relatively expensive valuation. With favorable return on capital and solid projections, Arch Capital is currently rated a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Truckers at MATS can try DAT's new iPhone load widget and beta
feed.summary: DAT Freight & Analytics will be showcasing new business tools and leading education sessions at the Mid-America Trucking Show (MATS) from March 26–28 in Louisville. Attendees can visit booth 37415 to experience demos, including a new iPhone widget for the DAT One app, and sign up for a beta test of an upcoming load-recommendation feature. The company will also highlight DAT Outgo for freight factoring and the Convoy Platform for automated load management, alongside various events like a silent auction and ProTalks sessions.

feed.title: UnitedHealth (UNH) Enhances Services with AI Companion Avery
feed.summary: UnitedHealth (UNH) has launched Avery, an AI-driven companion designed to streamline healthcare interactions for its 51 million members globally. While Avery promises to enhance efficiency and provide a customized experience, the company faces financial challenges, including declining margins, increased debt, and an Altman Z-Score suggesting financial stress. Investors should weigh these financial aspects against the promising innovation.

feed.title: Hydrogen Fluoride Market Set to Boom Rapidly by 2033 | Honeywell International Inc. • Solvay S.A. • Merck KGaA
feed.summary: A new report by Coherent Market Insights forecasts significant growth for the Hydrogen Fluoride Market between 2026 and 2033. The study provides an in-depth analysis of market size, trends, drivers, and competitive landscape, highlighting key players such as Honeywell International Inc. and Solvay S.A. It aims to offer actionable insights for businesses, investors, and policymakers to navigate market opportunities and risks.

feed.title: Barclays Maintains Rating, Lowers Price Target for TDOC | TDOC S
feed.summary: Barclays has maintained an "Equal-Weight" rating for Teladoc Health (TDOC) but lowered its price target from $8.50 to $7.00. This adjustment reflects a 17.65% decrease and follows similar actions by other firms like JP Morgan and Oppenheimer, though Deutsche Bank upgraded TDOC to "Buy." The telehealth company's average target price from analysts is $6.95, suggesting a potential upside of 24.78% from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $9.15.

feed.title: General Dynamics Electric Boat Wins $95M Navy Submarine Contract
feed.summary: General Dynamics Electric Boat Corp. secured a $95 million cost-plus-fixed-fee modification from the Navy for engineering, technical, design agent, and planning yard support for operational strategic and attack submarines. The work will be performed in multiple locations and is expected to finish by June 2026. This contract, awarded on March 23, 2026, involves significant fiscal year 2026 funds for research, development, test, and evaluation, along with operations and maintenance.

feed.title: Blackstone invests $250M in UAE firm, reaffirming confidence in the region (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. has invested $250 million in Advanced Digital Gaming Technology, a newly established payments and data intelligence platform based in the United Arab Emirates. This investment reaffirms Blackstone's confidence in the region despite recent adverse impacts on the financial sector due to the Iran war. The move highlights continued private equity interest in the Middle East's technology landscape.

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on Eversource Energy to $70 From $75, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has adjusted its price target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $70 from $75, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst revisions for Eversource, highlighting a dynamic outlook for the utility company. Eversource Energy specializes in distributing electricity and natural gas across Connecticut, Massachusetts, and New Hampshire.

feed.title: +4.38% for VeriSign stock as buyers drive price to weekly highs
feed.summary: VeriSign (VRSN) stock surged 4.38% today, closing at $251.70 and achieving a 4.54% weekly gain, driven by strong buyer momentum. Despite the rally, technical indicators suggest overbought conditions, increasing the risk of near-term consolidation or a mild correction. Analysts predict a trading range of $248.40–$257.96 for the coming week, with a low probability of further significant upside given current weekly indicators.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. stock surges on US-Iran peace hopes amid Dow Jones rally
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. stock climbed 1.90% to 225.79 USD on the US exchange, driven by optimism for a US-Iran peace deal that reduced geopolitical risks and boosted the Dow Jones. This surge highlights how de-escalation in energy flashpoints can benefit diversified industrial companies with strong infrastructure exposure. Investors are watching Honeywell's diversified revenue across aviation, energy transition, and productivity software, positioning it well for rotations as capital flows to quality cyclicals.

feed.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Defensive Stocks With Over 7% Dividend Yields
feed.summary: In turbulent market conditions, dividend-yielding defensive stocks become attractive. This article highlights three such stocks in the consumer staples sector—Conagra Brands (CAG), Kraft Heinz Co (KHC), and Energizer Holdings (ENR)—with dividend yields over 7%. It includes recent analyst ratings and price target revisions from top-performing analysts for each company.

feed.title: Assessing APA Corporation (APA) Valuation After Q4 2025 Earnings Beat And Permian Inventory Update
feed.summary: APA Corporation (APA) recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding market expectations, which has led to a significant increase in its share price. Despite trading above the average analyst price target, Simply Wall St's valuation model estimates a fair value of $30.46, suggesting the stock might be overvalued by 35.6%. However, a look at its P/E ratio relative to peers and the industry suggests the market might be applying a lower multiple, potentially indicating a value gap rather than a trap.

feed.title: Progressive prices $1.5B in senior notes; $1,487M net proceeds from debt sale
feed.summary: Progressive (PGR) has priced $1.5 billion in senior notes, expecting net proceeds of $1,487 million. The offering includes $500M of 4.60% notes due 2031 and $1B of 5.15% notes due 2036, with interest payable semi-annually. The closing is anticipated on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Residents Say Con Ed Gas Transmission Line Damaged Sewer Laterals: Con Ed Denies Responsibility
feed.summary: Residents in Fox Meadow and Greenacres, Scarsdale, are encountering significant issues with their sewer laterals after a Con Edison gas transmission line project. Homeowners are finding their sewer lines compressed or damaged, leading to repair costs of $35,000-$42,000, and problems obtaining compliance certificates for home sales. Con Edison and its contractor, Network Infrastructure, are denying responsibility, attributing damage to other causes like tree roots, despite local officials and residents pointing to the gas line installation as the cause.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Reiterates "Equal Weight" Rating for AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated an "Equal Weight" rating for AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB), adjusting its price target down to $203 from $208, which still suggests a 24.09% upside. Despite the slight reduction, the REIT's stock has faced multiple price target trims from other firms, contributing to a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $198.44. AvalonBay recently exceeded earnings expectations, posting an EPS of $2.85 against estimates of $2.84, with its shares currently trading near its 52-week low.

feed.title: Meta, Alphabet, Super Micro, Olaplex, Sandisk, Pony AI, and More Stock Market Movers
feed.summary: This article provides a brief overview of stock market movers, including Meta, Alphabet, Super Micro, Olaplex, Sandisk, and Pony AI. The market experienced a downturn on Thursday following Iran's rejection of a cease-fire deal.

feed.title: AI Investing Insights - Official Homepage - Intellectia AI™
feed.summary: This article is a "PAGE NOT FOUND" message on the Intellectia.AI website, indicating a broken link to an ETF page for "SUIG". Despite the error, the page provides navigation, features, and recent financial news articles including analyses on crypto, oil prices, and the Iran War. It also highlights Intellectia.AI as a platform for AI investing insights.

feed.title: Shift4 Payments (NYSE:FOUR) Downgraded by Raymond James Financial to "Outperform"
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial downgraded Shift4 Payments (NYSE:FOUR) from "strong-buy" to "outperform" but set a price target of $67.00, implying a 38.09% upside. The company surpassed quarterly earnings estimates with revenue up 50.6% year-over-year and provided strong FY2026 guidance. A major shareholder, Jared Isaacman, recently increased his holdings in the company, bringing insider ownership to over 25%.

feed.title: First Trust NASDAQ Technology Dividend Index Fund (NASDAQ:TDIV) to Issue $0.32 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: The First Trust NASDAQ Technology Dividend Index Fund (NASDAQ:TDIV) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.3153 per share, payable on March 31st to shareholders of record on March 26th. This distribution represents an annualized yield of approximately 1.3%. TDIV is an ETF that tracks a modified dividend-weighted NASDAQ technology index and currently trades around $95.33.
